emails.subject: Re: Travel and Seminars
emails.body: Re: Travel and Seminars Mark for your approval 1. Trip for me to San Diego to attend WSPP meeting. 2 Trip for Shari to Portland in November while Christian is on Thanksgiving holiday. Thanks ps I will schedule a meeting with you this week to discuss Shari/staffing in Portland office.
